lesson_generator.name: lesson_generator
lesson_generator.description: Converts lesson spec into section JSON objects following the lesson script schema

lesson_generator.name: remediation_filter
lesson_generator.description: Filters sections array to only those with real prompts — skips transitions and dialogue-only sections

lesson_generator.name: remediation_generator
lesson_generator.description: Generates incorrect validator states (L/M/H) for each prompt in a section

lesson_generator.name: remediation_merger
lesson_generator.description: Merges {id, incorrects} items back into full section objects to produce final lesson_sections.json

warmup_generator.name: warmup_generator
warmup_generator.description: Converts warmup spec into section JSON objects following the lesson script schema

warmup_generator.name: remediation_filter
warmup_generator.description: Filters sections array to only those with real prompts — skips transitions and dialogue-only sections

warmup_generator.name: remediation_generator
warmup_generator.description: Generates incorrect validator states (L/M/H) for each prompt in a section

warmup_generator.name: remediation_merger
warmup_generator.description: Merges {id, incorrects} items back into full section objects to produce final warmup_sections.json

exitcheck_generator.name: exitcheck_generator
exitcheck_generator.description: Converts exit check spec into section JSON objects following the lesson script schema

exitcheck_generator.name: remediation_filter
exitcheck_generator.description: Filters sections array to only those with real prompts — skips transitions and dialogue-only sections

exitcheck_generator.name: remediation_generator
exitcheck_generator.description: Generates incorrect validator states (L/M/H) for each prompt in a section

exitcheck_generator.name: remediation_merger
exitcheck_generator.description: Merges {id, incorrects} items back into full section objects to produce final exitcheck_sections.json

synthesis_generator.name: synthesis_generator
synthesis_generator.description: Converts synthesis spec into section JSON objects following the lesson script schema

synthesis_generator.name: remediation_filter
synthesis_generator.description: Filters sections array to only those with real prompts — skips transitions and dialogue-only sections

synthesis_generator.name: remediation_generator
synthesis_generator.description: Generates incorrect validator states (L/M/H) for each prompt in a section

synthesis_generator.name: remediation_merger
synthesis_generator.description: Merges {id, incorrects} items back into full section objects to produce final synthesis_sections.json

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: lesson_generator
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Converts lesson spec into section JSON objects — functional dialogue only, no voice enhancement

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: dialogue_rewriter
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Rewrites all dialogue beats in each section to improve voice, warmth, and naturalness

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: dialogue_merger
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Merges rewritten dialogue texts back into full section objects positionally

problem_pool_generator.name: problem_generator
problem_pool_generator.description: Generates specific problem instances from a problem template

problem_pool_generator.name: sequence_structurer
problem_pool_generator.description: Transforms problem instances into structured interaction sequences

problem_pool_generator.name: step_flattener
problem_pool_generator.description: Flattens multi-step sequences into individual step items for batch processing

problem_pool_generator.name: step_combiner
problem_pool_generator.description: Combines flattened step items back into sequences with steps arrays

problem_pool_generator.name: godot_formatter
problem_pool_generator.description: Transforms interaction sequences into Godot-processable format

problem_pool_generator.name: comparison_event_tagger
problem_pool_generator.description: Prepends Godot event tags to on_correct dialogue for comparison steps

problem_pool_generator.name: benchmark_label_hider
problem_pool_generator.description: Sets is_label_visible=false on all Benchmark tangibles in workspaces

problem_pool_generator.name: add_component
problem_pool_generator.description: Adds mastery_component to metadata and component to telemetry_data

problem_pool_generator.name: numline_fixer
problem_pool_generator.description: Fix NumLine labels, ticks, alt_labels, and readonly

problem_pool_generator.name: add_empty_workspace
problem_pool_generator.description: Adds empty workspace to first step if missing

problem_pool_generator.name: sample_per_template
problem_pool_generator.description: Sample random sequences per template for production
